alerts.headline: Winter Weather Advisory issued March 2 at 10:32PM EST until March 4 at 7:00AM EST by NWS Boston/Norton MA
alerts.description:
* WHAT...Mixed precipitation expected. Total snow accumulations up
to two inches and ice accumulations around one tenth of an inch.

* WHERE...Portions of northern Connecticut, central, eastern,
northeastern, and western Massachusetts, and northern Rhode Island.

* WHEN...From noon Tuesday to 7 AM EST Wednesday.

* IMPACTS...Plan on slippery road conditions. The hazardous
conditions could impact the Tuesday evening and Wednesday morning
commutes.

nws_forecast.name: Overnight
nws_forecast.detailed: Clear, with a low around 18. Southwest wind around 7 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Snow after 1pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 34. South wind 6 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New snow accumulation of less than one inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Rain And Snow then Light Rain
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain and snow before 8pm, then rain and snow between 8pm and 10pm, then rain and patchy fog. Cloudy, with a low around 32. Northeast wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New snow accumulation of less than one inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 47. Southwest wind around 7 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Patchy fog between 7pm and 8pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 30. Southwest wind around 6 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Slight Chance Freezing Rain then Chance Light Rain
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of freezing rain before 8am, then a chance of rain. Partly sunny, with a high near 42. North wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. Little or no ice accumulation expected.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain likely before 3am, then rain and snow. Cloudy, with a low around 34. Northeast wind 7 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%.

nws_forecast.name: Friday
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain and snow. Cloudy, with a high near 40. Northeast wind 8 to 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%.

nws_forecast.name: Friday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain. Cloudy, with a low around 33. East wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 50. South wind 5 to 10 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 42. Southwest wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Chance Light Rain then Partly Sunny
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain before 11am. Partly sunny, with a high near 53. West wind around 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Slight Chance Light Rain then Partly Cloudy
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain between 11pm and midnight. Partly cloudy, with a low around 39. Southwest wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Monday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly sunny, with a high near 58. Southwest wind around 9 mph.
